title: Peppery Greek Goat Stir-fry
description: A dense and peppery greek goat meat dish that is slow-cooked to perfection, making it a romantic and aromatic meal suitable for jain-friendly diets.
instructions: Clean and chop the goat meat into bite-sized pieces.
Finely chop onions and garlic cloves. Add olive oil to a pan, then sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Add chopped goat meat to the pan with red pepper flakes and stir-fry for about 10 minutes over medium heat or until no longer pink on the outside.
Mix finely chopped fresh parsley into the dish and cook for another minute. Reduce heat and serve hot.
